overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on an elevated train through a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in dense urban canyons with towering buildings and neon signage, transitioning to open waterfront industrial views, and concluding with a pan across the train's interior cabin featuring digital advertisements and seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track through dense commercial urban canyon

events.description: train passes from shadowed building canyon into sunlit section revealing distant hotel signage

agents.ego_description: riding elevated train through dense urban canyon observing passing building facades and neon signage

entered.detail: modern cylindrical glass building with reflective windows passing by at close range
distinctive teal-colored industrial building with exposed structural beams
vertical neon advertisement billboard with distinctive branding
residential building with balconies and external air conditioning units
tall white building with grid-patterned window facade

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a train ride through a dense urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides. The camera views curved glass towers, teal industrial structures, and various apartment blocks passing by closely. The environment is characterized by narrow enclosed spaces with partial sky visibility and mixed lighting conditions as the train moves through shadows and sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront industrial harbor with distant refinery complexes

events.description: view opens dramatically from enclosed urban canyon to wide waterfront harbor with industrial complexes and cargo vessels
camera begins gradual pan left from exterior building views toward train interior

agents.ego_description: continuing train ride as scenery transitions to waterfront industrial district with open harbor views

entered.detail: expansive body of water visible as train emerges from urban canyon
large industrial facility with smokestacks and processing towers across the harbor
large industrial ships docked at the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The train emerges from the dense urban canyon into a wide-open waterfront scene. The view expands to reveal a large harbor with industrial refinery complexes and cargo vessels in the distance. The camera begins a gradual leftward pan as the enclosed buildings give way to open water and industrial infrastructure under bright direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic train passenger cabin with digital advertising displays and seating

events.description: camera completes pan to reveal train interior with rows of empty seats and overhead digital advertisements
interior artificial lighting and neon advertisements become dominant as exterior view moves to background

agents.ego_description: observing the empty train cabin interior with digital advertisements, seating arrangements, and overhead lighting while continuing along the waterfront route

entered.detail: rows of gray upholstered seats with headrests and armrests
illuminated advertising panels displaying various brand messages and neon graphics
prominent yellow neon sign with FIXER branding above the windows
linear fluorescent lighting panels running the length of the cabin ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera pans fully into the train's interior cabin, revealing rows of empty passenger seats, overhead digital advertisements including a prominent FIXER neon sign, and linear ceiling lighting. The waterfront and industrial complex remain visible through the right-side windows but now serve as background to the detailed train interior. The scene is dominated by artificial lighting and futuristic transit design elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a wide industrial waterfront before turning inward to reveal the train's interior. It begins by gliding past curved glass towers, teal industrial structures, and dense apartment blocks that create a narrow, enclosed corridor of shifting light and shadow. As the train emerges from these towering buildings, the view suddenly expands into a bright, sunlit harbor featuring distant refinery complexes and cargo vessels. The camera then begins a gradual leftward pan, shifting its focus away from the open water and industrial infrastructure to reveal the cabin's interior. Finally, the scene settles on rows of empty passenger seats and overhead digital advertisements, including a prominent neon FIXER sign, while the waterfront remains visible through the side windows.
